libraries_desc: This application utilizes industry-standard, well-maintained, and legally licensed open-source libraries to ensure maximum stability and security.
security_desc: We prioritize your data privacy. EzyStore architecture is designed to handle sensitive information using secure API bridges and encrypted state management. No unauthorized tracking or data harvesting is performed.
